For Organizations

Bring Vibe Coding to Your Organization

Custom workshops for universities, startups and companies.

EmailLinkedInFacebook

Workshop Formats

Built for your context

University Guest Lecture

Bring cutting-edge AI product skills to your students. A single session that shifts how they think about building — from theory to real tools.

Startup Workshop

Move faster without hiring. Teach your entire team to prototype, automate, and ship using AI — in a single focused workshop day.

AI Bootcamp

Add an AI-native module to your existing bootcamp. We design a standalone vibe coding track that graduates students employers actually want.

Corporate Training

Future-proof your workforce with AI upskilling at scale. From executive briefings to department-wide programs that fit your culture.

The Process

Simple to get started

01

Book a call

Tell us about your team, goals, and timeline. A 30-minute conversation is all we need.

02

We design the session together

We tailor the workshop format, content, and exercises to your specific context and audience.

03

We deliver it to your team

A live, hands-on session that leaves your team with real skills and real things built.

Let's build something together.

Reach out directly — we'll design the right session for your team.

EmailLinkedInFacebook

Your Instructor
